generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news feed - our city's emergency response teams are being stretched thin. With rising threats, we need to give them the tools they need to keep us safe. The new domestic security measures might seem like an overreach, but when seconds count, we can't afford bureaucratic delays. #PublicSafetyFirst #SupportOurFirstResponders
